title: lithocarpus celebicus
intro: Lithocarpus celebicus is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family (Fagaceae), native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus celebicus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lithocarpus celebicus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its leaves, bark, and roots are commonly harvested for their medicinal value.
